# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
    component: log-collector
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
        component: log-collector
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: logging-agent
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: logging-agent
          image: fluent/fluent-bit:2.2.2@sha256:1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a2b
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            privileged: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          volumeMounts:
            - name: varlog
              mountPath: /var/log
              readOnly: true
            - name: varlibdockercontainers
              mountPath: /var/lib/docker/containers
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: fluent-bit-state
              mountPath: /var/fluent-bit/state
          env:
            - name: NODE_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: spec.nodeName
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      tolerations:
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
          effect: NoSchedule
      volumes:
        - name: varlog
          hostPath:
            path: /var/log
            type: Directory
        - name: varlibdockercontainers
          hostPath:
            path: /var/lib/docker/containers
            type: Directory
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi
        - name: fluent-bit-state
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 128Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: kube-system
  labels:
    app: logging-agent
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-netpol
  namespace: kube-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - ports:
        - port: 443
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 9200
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
